meaning: v.shoe的过去式及过去分词adj.穿着鞋的
examples: She turned on her elegantly shod heel.
The horses were sent to the blacksmith to be shod.
He has demonstrated a strong preference for being shod in running shoes.
Stand shod upon it for it is coarse and sharp and the stones cut under the feet.
Imelda Marcos, the well-shod wife of a former Filipino strongman, attributed her seemingly ill-gotten wealth to it.
